scope: CPU Vina runtime projection and docking-engine migration boundary

calibration.protocol: AutoDock Vina 1.2.7, exhaustiveness 32, one mode, two CPU threads per process

workloads.name: rebuild_final_mapk14_core_from_scratch
workloads.components: Train-696: 696 x 8 x 3 plus fresh validation: 1576 x 5 x 3

workloads.name: replay_major_historical_and_planned_docking
workloads.components: major CDK2 e32, MAPK14 e16 converted at one-half weight, MAPK14 e32 training, and fresh validation

assumptions: Jobs are independent and distributed without CPU oversubscription.
The target instance has comparable per-vCPU performance and sufficient memory.
Projection excludes queue time, installation, ligand preparation, transfer, and manual review.
Ligand-dependent search time explains the observed range; the median is the planning estimate.
Historical replay treats exhaustiveness 16 jobs as one-half of an exhaustiveness 32 equivalent; this is an approximate planning conversion, not a measured identity.
